name: First Ship Lease Trust
summary: First Ship Lease Trust, a business trust, owns a fleet of vessels in various shipping sub-sectors in Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company is involved in leasing and chartering vessels on long-term bareboat charters to the international shipping industry; and on short-term time charters, or in pools or spot markets. It operated 18 vessels, including product tankers, crude oil tankers, chemical tankers, and containerships. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Singapore. First Ship Lease Trust is a subsidiary of FSL Holdings Pte. Ltd.
